heroSubtitle: Download, complete, and bring patient forms to your appointment, or fill them out online before your visit.
beforeAppointmentBody1: To expedite your check-in and ensure we have complete information about your medical history, please complete the appropriate patient forms before your appointment.
beforeAppointmentBody2: You can either download and print the forms to bring with you, or fill them out online through our patient portal. If you need assistance completing any forms, please call us at (303) 951-0600.

formCategories.title: New Patient Paperwork
formCategories.description: Required forms for new patients visiting our clinics for the first time.

forms.title: New Patient Information & Medical History
forms.description: Comprehensive patient demographics and medical history form.

forms.title: General Consent for Care and Treatment
forms.description: Initial consent for medical evaluation and treatment.

forms.title: Consent to Leave or Send Medical Information
forms.description: Authorization for sharing medical records with other providers.

formCategories.title: Established Patient Paperwork
formCategories.description: Forms for patients with established care at CCPSA.

forms.title: Update Patient Information
forms.description: Form to update contact information, insurance, and medical history.

forms.title: Acknowledgement of Privacy Practices & Patient Responsibility
forms.description: HIPAA privacy notice acknowledgement and patient financial responsibility.

forms.title: Consent to Leave or Send Medical Information
forms.description: Authorization for sharing medical records with other providers.

formCategories.title: Additional Forms & Documents
formCategories.description: Specialized forms for specific conditions and procedures.

forms.title: Release of Information
forms.description: Detailed authorization for release of medical records.

forms.title: Sleep Diary
forms.description: Track your sleep patterns before your sleep medicine appointment.

forms.title: Sleep Study Instructions
forms.description: What to expect and how to prepare for your sleep study.

onlineServices.title: Patient Portal / Epic MyChart
onlineServices.description: Access your medical records, test results, view medications, and communicate with your care team.

onlineServices.title: Online Scheduling
onlineServices.description: Schedule or reschedule your appointments at your convenience, 24/7.

onlineServices.title: Online Bill Payment
onlineServices.description: Pay your medical bills securely online using our payment portal.

printingSteps: Click the Download button for the form you need
Print the PDF on standard 8.5" x 11" paper
Complete the form using black or blue ink
Bring the completed form to your appointment
onlineSteps: Log into your Patient Portal (Epic MyChart)
ctaBody: Complete your forms and book your appointment with one of our specialists.
